violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Stand alone refrigerator was holding at 50F. Facility is discarding salads.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Plates were stored vertical throughout the kitchen.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Employee bathroom does not have a self-closing door.
